data.title: REPLY S.p.A.: Shareholders’ Meeting Approves the 2025 Financial Statements
data.description: In Turin, Italy, the General Shareholders’ meeting of Reply S.p.A. [stock symbols EXM, STAR: REY] has confirmed the Financial Statements for the financial year 2025. They approved the distribution of a gross dividend of €1.35 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on 20 May 2026, with the dividend date scheduled for 18 May 2026 and the record date on 19 May 2026. The Reply Group wrapped up the 2025 financial year with a consolidated turnover of €2,483.6 million.

data.title: US Federal Court Rules MEDDPICC is a Generic Term, Orders Cancellation of Trademark Registration
data.description: In a recent ruling on the case of MEDDICC Ltd. vs. 01 Consulting LLC, the court has upheld MEDDPICC as a sales methodology available for unrestricted use within the US industry. The decision was made by the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania on April 23, 2026. This verdict solidifies MEDDPICC's status as a free and open methodology for sales practices in the US. The ruling is expected to have a significant impact on businesses and professionals utilizing this approach.

data.title: M31 Collaborates with TSMC to Achieve Tapeout of eUSB2V2 on N2P Process, Advancing Design IP Ecosystem
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Hsinchu, M31 Technology (M31), a leading global silicon IP provider, revealed during the TSMC 2026 North America Technology Symposium that their eUSB2V2 interface IP has successfully undergone tapeout on TSMC's N2P process. This milestone marks a significant achievement for M31, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the semiconductor industry. The completion of tapeout on TSMC's N2P process underscores M31's dedication to staying at the forefront of technology advancements.

data.title: Resolutions at the Annual General Meeting in HMS Networks
data.description: HMS Networks AB (publ) convened its Annual General Meeting on April 23, 2026. During the meeting, all matters put forth aligning with proposals from the Board of Directors and the Nomination Committee garnered approval. Key resolutions passed include the endorsement of important agenda items.
Mercosur is set to discuss Venezuela's possible return to the South American trade bloc

data.title: FreeCast Reaches National Agreement with DIRECTV Multifamily to Sell DIRECTV Services
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, FreeCast and DIRECTV Multifamily have recently disclosed a national distribution arrangement, granting FreeCast the rights to promote and distribute DIRECTV streaming services in Multifamily residential buildings. Under this agreement, FreeCast is now permitted to sell DIRECTV services in a variety of residential settings, including apartments, condominiums, HOAs, student housing, and senior living communities. This partnership allows FreeCast to broaden its reach in the multifamily industry, enhancing its service offerings, and providing DIRECTV access to a new audience, with an aim to enhance service distribution and cater to a wider customer base.

data.title: Ouster BlueCity Selected for Major Traffic Signal Management and Road Safety Deployments Across 30+ Intersections in and around Atlanta, Georgia
data.description: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST) revealed that its traffic management system, Ouster BlueCity, is set to operate at over 30 intersections in the greater Atlanta region. The Company collaborated with the Georgia Department of Transportation (GDOT) and distributor Southern Lighting & Traffic Systems to bring this innovation. Ouster is recognized for its expertise in sensing and perception for Physical AI.

data.title: Perion, Mediamark and McSorely Media Launch Exclusive AI Advertising Partnership Across Africa
data.description: Perion Network Ltd. (NASDAQ and TASE: PERI) revealed a new partnership with McSorely Media and Mediamark, major media companies in Africa. This exclusive collaboration will introduce Perion's AI-native execution agent, Outmax, to the region. The deal signifies a strategic move to enhance Perion's presence in the market and open up opportunities for growth. Through this venture, Perion aims to leverage its advanced technology solutions in digital advertising to cater to the dynamic landscape of the African media industry.

data.title: HighPeak Energy, Inc. Announces 2026 First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on April 23, 2026, HighPeak Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: HPK) revealed its intention to disclose the financial and operational outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 following the market's closure on Wednesday, May 6, 2026.

data.title: Clean Energy Technologies Receives Notice of Deficiency from Nasdaq
data.description: Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: CETY), a company specializing in clean energy technology and solutions, recently disclosed receiving a written notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market on April 17, 2026. The notice cited non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the company not filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year that ended on December 31, 2025. This development implies potential repercussions for CETY's listing status on the stock market.

data.title: Dow reports first quarter 2026 results
data.description: In Midland, Michigan, on April 23, 2026, Dow (NYSE: DOW) reported financial highlights. Net sales amounted to $9.8 billion, marking a 6% decrease compared to the previous year. This decline was primarily due to stagnant sales in Performance Materials & Coatings and reductions in the remaining operating segments. The volume also saw a 2% decrease year-over-year, with the decrease attributed to...

data.title: VIZSLA SILVER AWARDS EPCM AND MINE DESIGN CONTRACTS FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE PANUCO SILVER-GOLD PROJECT
data.description: Vancouver-based Vizsla Silver Corp. (NYSE: VZLA, TSX: VZLA) revealed on April 23, 2026 that it has chosen M3 for its Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management (EPCM) contract. The company, listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under 0G3, made this significant announcement indicating a strategic move for its operations.

data.title: PG&E Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; On Track to Deliver Solid 2026; Bundled Residential Electric Rates Now Down 23% since 2024 for Most Vulnerable Customers
data.description: In Oakland, California, on April 23, 2026, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) is reporting positive financial performance for the year. In the first quarter of 2026, the company saw a significant increase in GAAP earnings, reaching $0.39 per share, compared to $0.28 per share during the same period in 2025. This steady progress indicates a promising year ahead for PG&E Corporation in terms of financial growth.
